name: blood-transfusion-set-606
description:
Brief Description: A sterile, single-use blood transfusion set featuring a single chamber (burette) for gravity-based administration of blood and blood components. It includes a standard spike, a 15-micron blood filter, and a roller clamp for flow regulation.

Key Specifications:

Chamber: Single (usually around 150-200ml capacity).

Filter: Integrated 15-micron or 20-micron blood filter to trap clots.

Tubing Length: Typically 150cm - 180cm.

Drip Chamber: Features a blood filter.

Connector: Luer Lock or Luer Slip.

Key Features:

Sterilized by Ethylene Oxide (EO Gas).

Non-toxic, non-pyrogenic, and latex-free.

Clear, flexible tubing for easy monitoring.

Transparent chamber for visual volume assessment.

Intended Use: For the transfusion of whole blood, packed red blood cells (PRBC), and other blood components.

✍️ Suggested Product Description
You can copy and paste this into your product editor:

The PROMED Single Chamber Blood Transfusion Set is designed for the safe and reliable administration of blood and blood components. It features a specialized integrated 15-micron filter within the drip chamber to effectively trap clots and micro-aggregates, preventing them from entering the patient.

This gravity-feed set includes a sharp spike for bag entry, a single chamber (burette) for monitoring volume, and a roller clamp for precise flow control. Manufactured from medical-grade, non-toxic materials, the set is sterile and non-pyrogenic.

Technical Specifications:

Material: PVC, Medical Grade.

Filter Rating: 15µ - 20µ (Blood filter).

Connection: Standard Luer Lock/Slip.

Latex-Free: Yes.

Ideal for use in hospitals, clinics, and emergency care settings where sterile, high-quality blood administration is required.

name: widall-2-Antigens
description:
Product Overview and Classification
The Widal-2-Antigens product is an In Vitro Diagnostic (IVD) medical device categorized as a serological reagent . It is used to perform the Widal agglutination test, a serological assay that aids in the diagnosis of enteric fever (typhoid and paratyphoid fever) caused by Salmonella Typhi and Salmonella Paratyphi .

The test works by detecting the presence of agglutinating antibodies (agglutinins) in a patient's blood serum. When a patient's serum contains antibodies against Salmonella bacteria, and it is mixed with the antigen suspension, a visible clumping (agglutination) occurs

name: Cryovial Tube
description: Premium cryogenic storage tube made from medical-grade polypropylene. Temperature resistant from -196°C to +121°C. Features leak-proof silicone O-ring seal, RNase/DNase-free, gamma-sterilized. Ideal for cell culture, DNA/RNA storage, and biobanking. Available in 0.5ml–5.0ml capacities with self-standing or round-bottom options.

name: Micro Slides
description: Premium optical-quality microscope slides made from soda lime glass or borosilicate glass. Standard dimensions 75mm x 25mm x 1mm thick. Features precision ground edges with 45° beveled safety corners, optically clear surface for distortion-free viewing. Available in plain, single frosted, or double frosted options for easy labeling. Pre-cleaned, ready to use. Ideal for histology, cytology, hematology, microbiology, pathology, and educational applications. Compatible with automated staining platforms and coverslips.

name: Lithium Heparin Non-Vacuum Blood Collection Tube
description:
Product Overview

Lithium Heparin Non-Vacuum Tubes are specialized blood collection tubes designed for plasma-based biochemical testing. They contain lithium heparin as an anticoagulant, which prevents blood clotting and ensures accurate lab results. These tubes require manual blood transfer (no vacuum), making them ideal for controlled sample collection in clinical and laboratory settings.

Key Features
Non-vacuum design – allows controlled blood transfer using a syringe
Lithium heparin coating – prevents clotting for plasma analysis
 High-quality medical-grade material
Leak-proof cap for safe handling
Compatible with standard lab centrifugation
Clear labeling area for patient/sample identification
Specifications
Additive: Lithium Heparin
Tube Type: Non-vacuum
Material: PET / Glass (depending on variant)
Cap Color: Green (industry standard for heparin tubes)
Volume Capacity: 2ml / 3ml / 5ml / 10ml (varies by option)
Sterility: Sterile, single-use
Shelf Life: 12–24 months
Storage Conditions: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
Applications
Clinical chemistry tests
Plasma determinations
Electrolyte analysis
Emergency and ICU blood sampling
Hospital, diagnostic labs, research centers
What’s in the Package
Pack of Lithium Heparin Non-Vacuum Tubes (quantity varies: 50 / 100 pcs per box)

name: U-100 Insulin Syringe
description:
Product Overview

The U-100 Insulin Syringe (1ml) is a precision-engineered disposable syringe designed for accurate insulin administration. It features a fine, ultra-sharp needle and clear measurement markings to ensure safe, painless, and precise dosing for diabetic patients and healthcare professionals.

Key Features
1ml (U-100) capacity – calibrated for insulin dosing
Ultra-fine needle – minimizes pain during injection
Clear, easy-to-read scale markings
Smooth plunger for controlled injection
Sterile and single-use for maximum safety
Protective cap for hygiene and storage
Specifications
Capacity: 1ml (100 units insulin)
Type: U-100 Insulin Syringe
Needle Size: 29G / 30G / 31G (varies by stock)
Needle Length: 6mm – 12mm
Material: मेडिकल-grade plastic
Sterility: Individually packed, sterile
Usage: Single-use only
Applications
Insulin administration for diabetic patients
Hospital and clinical use
Home care and personal diabetes management
